compost banana peels: composting status unresolved != included

methodology_note: Curated regression metrics use hand-authored cases for known supported behavior. LLM-generated challenge metrics use a frozen set of 30 generated natural-language journals with reviewed expected outputs to probe broader phrasing and generalization. Offline metrics use a deterministic emissions-provider stub to evaluate extraction, normalization, status handling, assumptions, confidence discipline, partial coverage, and total integrity without live provider variability. Deployed metrics measure observed Cloud Run API latency separately.
